sqlMap.select: SELECT $v_pITEMNAME$ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# LIMIT 1
SELECT $v_pITEMNAME$ FROM TBL_MENUITEM_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# LIMIT 1
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE WHERE PORTALPAGEID = #v_pUID# AND ACCESSIDLIST = #v_pACCESSLISTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RENDEREDHTML FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE WHERE PORTALPAGEID = #v_PORTALPAGEID# AND ACCESSIDLIST = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT PARENTUID FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT PARENTUID FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pTEMP# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND CN = #v_pCN# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT UID_ , PARENTUID , DISPLAYNAME , WIDTH , HEIGHT , ROWLENGTH , COLUMNLENGTH , ROWSPLIT , COLUMNSPLIT FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT B.* FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL A, TBL_USERINFO B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND B.UserID = #v_pUSERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.* FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL A, TBL_USERINFO B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND B.UserID = #v_pUSERID# AND B.lang = #v_pLANG# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT B.* FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.ParentUID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.UseFlag = #v_pUSERFLAG# AND B.CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND B.ParentUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND B.GubunFlag = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND B.CreatorID = #v_pUSERID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL ( UID_, PARENTUID, DEPTH, DISPLAYNAME, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATEDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWLENGTH, COLUMNLENGTH, ROWSPLIT, COLUMNSPLIT, GUBUNFLAG, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_pNEWPAGEID# , #v_pPARENTUID# , #v_pDEPTH# , #v_pUSERNAME# , #v_pUSERID# , #v_pUSERNAME# , STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') , Width , Height , RowLength , ColumnLength , RowSplit , ColumnSplit , #v_pGUBUNFLAG# , #v_pCOMPANYID# , #tenantID# FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPARENTUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_ACL ( UID_, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, VIEW_RIGHT, EDIT_RIGHT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pNEWPAGEID#, #v_pACCESSID#, #v_pACCESSNAME#, #v_pVIEW_RIGHT#, #v_pEDIT_RIGHT#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(B.UID_) FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.ParentUID AND A.UseFlag = '$v_pUSEFLAG$' AND B.CompanyID = '$v_pCOMPANYID$' AND B.CreatorID = '$v_pCREATORID$' AND B.GubunFlag = '$v_pGUBUNFLAG$' AND A.TENANT_ID = $tenantID$ AND B.TENANT_ID = $tenantID$

SELECT B.* FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL B WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = $tenantID$ )) AND A.UID_ = B.ParentUID AND A.UseFlag = '$v_pUSEFLAG$' AND A.TENANT_ID = $tenantID$ AND B.TENANT_ID = $tenantID$
AND B.CompanyID = '$v_pCOMPANYID$' AND B.UseFlag = '$v_pUSEFLAG$' AND B.CreatorID = '$v_pUSERID$' AND B.GubunFlag = '$v_pGUBUNFLAG$'
AND B.CompanyID = '$v_pCOMPANYID$' AND B.ParentUID = '$v_pPARENTUID$' AND B.CreatorID = '$v_pUSERID$' AND B.GubunFlag = '$v_pGUBUNFLAG$'
SELECT EDIT_RIGHT FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT VIEW_RIGHT FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT TYPE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.* FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A , TBL_PORTAL_ACL B WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )) AND A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND A.GubunFlag = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND A.CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND (B.AccessID = '$v_pACCESSIDLIST$' AND $v_pSTRRIGHT$ ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL A WHERE (NOT EXISTS( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ))
AND DISPLAYNAME like CONCAT('%', #v_pDISPLAYNAME#, '%')
AND USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG#
AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID#
AND LANG = #v_pLANG#
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #v_pENDROW#

SELECT A.* , B.DISPLAYNAME AS THEMENM, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS THEMENM2, B.DISPLAYNAME3 AS THEMENM3, B.DISPLAYNAME4 AS THEMENM4 FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL A LEFT JOIN TBL_THEME_GENERAL B ON A.THEMEUID = B.UID_ AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE (NOT EXISTS( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND A.DISPLAYNAME like CONCAT('%', #v_pDISPLAYNAME#, '%')
AND USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG#
AND A.COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID#
ORDER BY A.DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #v_pENDROW#

select.isEqual: SELECT TOPURL FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT MAINURL FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT LINKURL FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT LINKURL FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.UID_ FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_LOGOS A, TBL_PORTAL_ACL B WHERE A.OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND ( B.ACCESSID = #v_pACCESSID# AND B.VIEW_RIGHT = 2 ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND SKINNUM = #v_pSKINNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.PARAMNAME ParamName , A.PARAMVALUE ParamValue , A.PARAMTYPE ParamType , B.PARAMINFO ParamInfo FROM TBL_MENUITEM_PARAMETERS A JOIN TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS B ON A.PARAMTYPE = B.PARAMTYPE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.UID_ = #v_pUID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.PARAMNAME ParamName , A.PARAMVALUE ParamValue , A.PARAMTYPE ParamType , B.PARAMINFO ParamInfo FROM TBL_PORTLET_PARAMETERS A JOIN TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS B ON A.PARAMTYPE = B.PARAMTYPE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.UID_ = #v_pPortletID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC

SELECT A.* , B.NORMALIMAGEPATH FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS A LEFT JOIN TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE B ON A.IMAGEUID = B.UID_ AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND B.SKINNUM = #v_pSKINNUM# WHERE A.PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND A.OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE PARENTMENUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT TRIM($v_pPITEMNAME$) FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# LIMIT 1
SELECT TRIM($v_pPITEMNAME$) FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLETID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# LIMIT 1
SELECT PAGEUID FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pTEMP# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT UID_ , PARENTUID , DISPLAYNAME , WIDTH , HEIGHT , ROWLENGTH , COLUMNLENGTH , ROWSPLIT , COLUMNSPLIT FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTALPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE WHERE PORTALPAGEID = #v_PORTALPAGEID# AND ACCESSIDLIST = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE ( PORTALPAGEID, ACCESSIDLIST, RENDEREDHTML, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PORTALPAGEID#, #v_ACCESSIDLIST#, #v_RENDEREDHTML#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT BASETYPE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT UID_ , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DISPLAYNAME3 , DISPLAYNAME4 , IMAGEURL , TOPURL , MAINURL , COMPANAYID , CREATORID , CREATORNM , CREATEDATE , MODIFYDATE FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE COMPANAYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CREATEDATE
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_CATEGORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTPAGEID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #v_pUSERID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL ( UID_, PARENTUID, DEPTH, DISPLAYNAME, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATEDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWLENGTH, COLUMNLENGTH, ROWSPLIT, COLUMNSPLIT, GUBUNFLAG, COMPANYID, THEMEUID, DEFAULTPAGE, TABLEVIEWOPTION, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_pNEWPAGEID# , #v_pPARENTPAGEID# , #v_pDEPTH# , #v_pUSERID# , #v_pUSERID# , #v_pUSERID# , STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') , WIDTH , HEIGHT , ROWLENGTH , COLUMNLENGTH , ROWSPLIT , COLUMNSPLIT , #v_pGUBUNFLAG# , #v_pCOMPANYID# , THEMEUID , DEFAULTPAGE , TABLEVIEWOPTION , #tenantID# FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPARENTPAGEID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_ACL ( UID_, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, VIEW_RIGHT, EDIT_RIGHT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pNEWPAGEID#, #v_pACCESSID#, #v_pACCESSNAME#, #v_pVIEW_RIGHT#, #v_pEDIT_RIGHT#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL ( UID_, PARENTUID, DEPTH, DISPLAYNAME, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATEDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWLENGTH, COLUMNLENGTH, ROWSPLIT, COLUMNSPLIT, GUBUNFLAG, COMPANYID, THEMEUID, DEFAULTPAGE, TABLEVIEWOPTION, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_pPAGEID# , #v_pPARENTPAGEID# , #v_pDEPTH# , #v_pUSERID# , #v_pUSERID# , #v_pUSERID# , STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') , Width , Height , RowLength , ColumnLength , RowSplit , ColumnSplit , #v_pGUBUNFLAG# , #v_pCOMPANYID# , ThemeUID , DefaultPage , TableViewOption , #tenantID# FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPARENTPAGEID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_ACL ( UID_, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, VIEW_RIGHT, EDIT_RIGHT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pPAGEID#, #v_pACCESSID#, #v_pACCESSNAME#, #v_pVIEW_RIGHT#, #v_pEDIT_RIGHT#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE DISPLAYNAME = #v_pUserID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND USEFLAG = #v_pUSERFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE DISPLAYNAME = #v_PUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEFAULTPAGE = 'Y' LIMIT 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG# WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #v_pUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CREATORID , URL FROM TBL_PORTLET_URL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_CREATORID# AND USERTYPE = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT CREATORID , BOARDID , ITEMCOUNT , ITEMFIELDS FROM TBL_PORTLET_BOARD WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_CREATORID# AND USERTYPE = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT DISTINCT A.UID_ , A.DisplayName FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, TBL_PORTAL_ACL companyACL WHERE A.USEFLAG = 'Y' AND A.COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND A.GubunFlag = REPLACE(#v_pGUBUNFLAG#, 'c', ' ') AND A.UID_ = companyACL.UID_ AND ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDUSER# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) OR ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDDEPT# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pIDUSER# AND VIEW_RIGHT = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) OR ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDCOMPANY# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE ACCESSID IN ( #v_pIDUSER#,#v_pIDDEPT# ) AND View_Right = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.UID_ ASC
SELECT UID_ , PARENTUID , GUBUNFLAG , USEFLAG FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE DISPLAYNAME = #v_pDISPLAYNAME# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY UID_ ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.UID_) FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, TBL_PORTAL_ACL companyACL WHERE A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND A.CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND A.GubunFlag = REPLACE(#v_pGUBUNFLAG#, 'c', ' ') AND A.UID_ = companyACL.UID_ AND ( ( companyACL.ACCESSID = #v_pIDUSER# AND companyACL.VIEW_RIGHT = '2' ) OR ( ( companyACL.ACCESSID = #v_pIDDEPT# AND companyACL.VIEW_RIGHT = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pIDUSER# AND VIEW_RIGHT = '1' ) ) OR ( ( companyACL.ACCESSID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND companyACL.VIEW_RIGHT = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE ACCESSID IN ( #v_pIDUSER#,#v_pIDDEPT# ) AND VIEW_RIGHT = '1' ) ) ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.UID_ AS UID_, B.DEPTH AS DEPTH, A.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME ,A.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2 , B.USEFLAG AS USEFLAG , B.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, (SELECT IMAGEURL FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_=B.THEMEUID AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS IMAGEURL FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A , (SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE DISPLAYNAME= #v_pDISPLAYNAME# AND GUBUNFLAG= #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID#) B
WHERE A.UID_ = B.PARENTUID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #v_pENDROW#

SELECT a.UID_ UID_ , a.IMAGEUID ImageUID , a.OWNERPAGEID ParentUID , a.DISPLAYNAME DisplayName , a.LINKURL LinkURL FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS a, ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG# AND LANG = #v_pLANG# AND THEMEUID = #v_pUSERTHEMEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) b WHERE a.PARENTUID = '203' AND a.OWNERPAGEID = b.uid_ AND ( a.DISPLAYNAME = '홈' OR a.DISPLAYNAME = 'home' OR a.LINKURL = '/ezPortal/myPortal.do' ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT a.UID_ UID_ , a.IMAGEUID ImageUID , a.OWNERPAGEID ParentUID , a.DISPLAYNAME DisplayName , a.LINKURL LinkURL FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS a, ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG# AND THEMEUID = #v_pUSERTHEMEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) b WHERE a.PARENTUID = '203' AND a.OWNERPAGEID = b.uid_ AND a.DISPLAYNAME = '홈' AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE PARENTUID = '$v_pPARENTUID$' AND ACCESSID = '$v_pUSERID$' AND COMPANYID = '$v_pCOMPANYID$' AND TENANT_ID = $tenantID$ )
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND ACCESSID = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE PARENTUID = '$v_pPARENTUID$' AND ACCESSID = '$v_pUSERID$' AND COMPANYID = '$v_pCOMPANYID$' AND TENANT_ID = $tenantID$ )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM ( UID_, PARENTUID, IMAGEUID, ACCESSID, COMPANYID, LINKURL, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( '$v_pHOMEUID$', '$v_pPARENTUID$', '$v_pIMAGEUID$', '$v_pUSERID$', '$v_pCOMPANYID$', '$v_pLINKURL$', $tenantID$ )
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT AA.UID_ , AA.IMAGEUID , AA.OWNERPAGEID , AA.DISPLAYNAME , AA.LINKURL , AA.COLUMNPOS , AA.VIEW_RIGHT , AA.ACCESSID , AA.ORDERNUM FROM ( SELECT A.UID_ , A.IMAGEUID , A.OWNERPAGEID , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.LINKURL , A.COLUMNPOS , B.ACCESSID , B.VIEW_RIGHT , INSTR(CONCAT(',' ,#v_DEPTPATH#, ','), CONCAT( ',' , B.AccessID , ',')) ORDERNUM , CASE WHEN B.ACCESSID = 'everyone' THEN '1' WHEN INSTR(CONCAT(',' , #v_DEPTPATH# , ','), CONCAT(',' ,B.AccessID , ',')) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END FLAG FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS A LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_ACL B ON A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PARENTUID = '203' AND A.OWNERPAGEID = #v_PUSETOPMENUID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AA WHERE AA.FLAG = '1' ORDER BY AA.COLUMNPOS, AA.ORDERNUM
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE UID_ = #v_pOLDUID# AND ACCESSID = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM ( SELECT a.UID_ , a.OWNERPAGEID , a.IMAGEUID , #v_pUSERID# , #v_pCOMPANYID# , a.LinkURL , #v_pLANGSTR#, #tenantID# FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS a, ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND USEFLAG = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) b WHERE a.PARENTUID = '203' AND a.OWNERPAGEID = b.UID_ AND A.UID_ = #v_pUID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = NULL WHERE UID_ != #v_pUID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG# WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.*, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_CATEGORY WHERE CATEGORY = REPLACE(A.GUBUNFLAG, 'C', '')) AS GUBUNNAME FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A WHERE (NOT EXISTS( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )) AND DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DISPLAYNAME#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND USEFLAG = #v_USERFLAG#
AND GUBUNFLAG IN (#v_ARRPARAM#)
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pDISPLAYNAME# ,'%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND PORTLET_TYPE = #v_pGUBUNFLAG#
AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID#
AND /* GUBUNFLAG IN ('0', '|| $v_pPAGEGUBUNFLAG$ ||') */ GUBUNFLAG IN ('0', '$v_pPAGEGUBUNFLAG$')
AND GUBUNFLAG = '0'
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #v_pENDROW#
SELECT UID_, DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_MENUITEM_GENERAL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%' , #v_pDISPLAYNAME# , '%') ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT $v_pENDROW$

select.isEqual: SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND PARENTUID = '202' AND DISPLAYNAME = '관리자' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND PARENTUID = '202' AND DISPLAYNAME = 'Administrator' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND PARENTUID = '202' AND DISPLAYNAME = '管理者' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND PARENTUID = '202' AND DISPLAYNAME = '管理者' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_pRESULT# AND ACCESSID = #v_pACCESSID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_pRESULT# AND ACCESSID = #v_pACCESSID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_pRESULT# AND ACCESSID = #v_pACCESSID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_ACL ( UID_, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, VIEW_RIGHT, EDIT_RIGHT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pRESULT#, #v_pACCESSID#, #v_pACCESSID#, '2', '2', #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_ACL SET VIEW_RIGHT = '2', EDIT_RIGHT = '2' WHERE UID_ = #v_pRESULT# AND ACCESSID = #v_pACCESSID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.UID_ , A.PARAMNAME , A.PARAMVALUE , A.PARAMTYPE , B.PARAMINFO , B.DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_PORTLET_PARAMETERS A JOIN TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS B ON A.PARAMTYPE = B.PARAMTYPE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT A.MaxURL , B.* FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL A, TBL_PORTLET_IMAGE B WHERE A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.UID_ = #v_UID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT HTMLDATA FROM TBL_PORTLET_HTMLPAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT PARENTUID FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #parentTopMenuID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT PARENTUID FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #temp# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM ($strSQL$) A ORDER BY A.RowPos
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM ($strSQL$) A ORDER BY A.RowPos

SELECT DISTINCT * FROM ($strSQL$) A WHERE A.UID_ NOT IN (SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS_CHANGE WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND PAGEUID = A.PAGEUID AND OWNERPAGEUID = A.OWNERPAGEUID AND CREATORID = '$pUserID$' AND OWNERPAGEUID = '$pTopParentPageID$' AND CHANGEFLAG = '2' ) ORDER BY A.RowPos
SELECT TOPURL FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT MAINURL FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_URL WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_HTMLPAGE WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_, CREATORID, USERTYPE, BOARDID, ITEMCOUNT, ITEMFIELDS FROM TBL_PORTLET_BOARD WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #pResult# AND ACCESSID = #pAccessID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE DISPLAYNAME = #pDisplayName# AND COMPANYID = #pCompanyID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #pGubunFlag# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Portal_ACL WHERE UID_ = #pResult# AND ACCESSID = #pAccessID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_ACL SET VIEW_RIGHT = '2' , EDIT_RIGHT = '2' WHERE UID_ = #pResult# AND ACCESSID = #pAccessID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_PortalPage_General SET UseFlag = #useFlag# WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #pUserID# AND COMPANYID = #pCompanyID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #pGubunFlag# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = #useFlag# WHERE UID_ != #pUID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #pUserID# AND COMPANYID = #pCompanyID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #pGubunFlag# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
